Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alazar]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Alazar is known as the Perfected Mage.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Alazar is known as the Perfected Mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Alazar is a figure whose presence would allow the Karoshans to overcome D’Niss magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Alazar is capable of matching enemy spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Alazar is a Perfected Mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Alazar is known as the Perfected Mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Alazar is a mage who may have access to the royal court's magical treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Alazar is known as the Perfected Mage.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
